title: Luminace Blocks
body:
Luminace Blocks is a mod I made for my mod: End Ore

Developers can use this mod to see which block lighting they want for their block(s)

BSL shaders is highly recommended!

# Q&A:

### 
Will be backported to version 1.x.x?
- Yes, backports to 1.16.5 for forge, and 1.17.1 for fabric


The blocks aren't glowing properly!
- Make sure to have BSL Shaders installed and applied
### 
#
